utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , I ... Look , I am having a great time with you and I just do not want us to move to fast or put to much pressure on us .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I just do not want us to move to fast or put to much pressure on us .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So , I am sorry I just do not think we should go away together yet .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I just do not think we should go away together yet .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is ... it is too soon .

utterances.speaker: Elizabeth
utterances.text: Ross , I think you misunderstood what I was saying . I just wanted to tell you that I am going to Florida for a couple weeks .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No . I think you misunderstood what I was saying .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I think you misunderstood what I was saying . I just wanted to tell you that I am going to Florida for a couple weeks .
